title: centaurea lactiflora
intro: Centaurea lactiflora, also known as Great White or White Bloomed Cock's Comb, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. Its flowers, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea lactiflora include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea lactiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in poultices and topical applications.
